aries:
♈ Aries

💼 Career: Quick initiative ek naya opening la sakta hai

💰 Money: Sudden expense possible

🧘 Advice: Speed se pehle clarity lao

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Har battle ladna zaruri nahi hota
